_comment: Founders and CEOs of early-stage tech startups (1-50 employees) in the US. Boolean title captures Founder + Co-Founder + CEO + 'Chief Executive Officer'. NOT excludes serial-advisor profiles ('Former Founder', 'Ex-CEO').

values.text: (Founder OR "Co-Founder" OR CEO OR "Chief Executive Officer") NOT (Former OR Ex OR Advisor OR Mentor OR "Board Member")
